title: Real learner beta pilot and feedback loop

acceptance_criteria.text: Define a beta pilot script that asks real learners to install, choose a track, study for at least 30 minutes, complete practice, take or start a mock exam, use flashcards, create a backup, restore/import if practical, and report friction.
Recruit or identify a small beta cohort with at least one A+ learner and one non-A+ track learner, or record the exact recruiting blocker.

Create a structured feedback form that separates install friction, study clarity, content trust, assessment difficulty, accessibility, performance, backup confidence, and overall willingness to keep using the app.
Triage beta feedback into defects, content issues, UX issues, docs/support issues, and future ideas, creating follow-up work items for actionable findings.
Produce a beta pilot report with participant count, scenarios completed, major findings, fixes made, unresolved risks, and release recommendation.

source: Gap review: real learner beta loop
